learned. He will fall in love with anotlier woman. He will enter service in his
26th year and will get married at 28. He has brothers versed in many subjects.
Jupiter and Saturn's conjunction in the third house from the Sun indicates the
father getting financial help from his brother's educational institution (the
Moon in 4th from the Sun). The native will live up to 60 or 62 years happily.
